title: TH's Boss Musics
description: A simple mod that brings custom boss themes to Minecraft’s bosses
body:
**TH’s Boss Musics adds original boss themes to Minecraft’s strongest foes!**

# **Features:**

## 4 Fully Original Boss Themes
Intense,looping soundtracks composed exclusively for:
- Ender Dragon
- Wither
- Warden
- Elder Guardian



## Unique Music Disc Drops
Defeating any of these bosses rewards you with their exclusive music disc,letting you enjoy the theme anywhere in your world.
- Ender Dragon → The Last Flight Music Disc
- Wither → Blight Might Music Disc
- Warden → Where Light Dies Music Disc
- Elder Guardian → Maelstorm Music Disc



## Dynamic Boss Music System
Warden,Ender Dragon,and Wither automatically play their themes when you approach or fight them, creating a more enjoyable experience.

Elder Guardian intentionally does NOT auto-play due to its high spawn count in ocean monuments. This prevents overlapping audio and keeps your gameplay clean but don't worry! It still drops its disc when defeated.



## Original OST
All tracks are composed,mixed and mastered by me/TeHaş.
The tracks are shaped around my headcanons about the lore.Each boss theme reflects how I imagine them.

You can also listen to the full soundtrack on YouTube! (@TeHas_TM)

## Warning!
This mod may conflict with other mods that add boss themes for these mobs.For an example:True Ending's Dragon theme and mine collapses on each other,the best choice is to either close the music of True Ending from config,~~or just don't use my mod.~~

## Thank you for supporting me!
Every download,share and comment will motivate me to try and add more things to Minecraft!
